title: Atori SMP Staffel 2 Pro Max Edition
description: Modpack for the second season of the Atori SMP. Most immersive edition.
body:
# Atori SMP Season 2 Modpack (Pro Max Edition)

This is a modpack for the players of Atori SMP to join the server. This does not include the server-side mods of the SMP.

This edition of the modpack includes the most changes in comparison to the Mini and Pro Edition, creating the most immersive experience of all.

There are also two other version of this modpack. Both aren't as immersive however!
